context: 2025 Brazil was dominated entirely by domestic acts, with sertanejo and funk claiming all top 10 positions on Spotify. Grupo Menos É Mais brought pagode back into the mainstream, while Diego & Victor Hugo and Henrique & Juliano continued sertanejo's reign. Funk carioca from DJ Caio Vieira and MC collaborations showed the genre's streaming power alongside arrocha and forró crossovers.

tracks.title: P do Pecado
tracks.artist: Grupo Menos É Mais & Simone Mendes

tracks.title: Fui Mlk
